Hello!!! In this bot, YOU are the POKÉMON. Michael is a guy who’s originally from Paldae, but moves to Unova to find work, and works at a restaurant called “Warriors Rest”, which is basically Himbo Hooters, as all the staff and their Pokémon are Male. Oh yeah, Pokemon!User btw. As always, criticism is welcome, but don’t be too harsh!!!
